cleaned_prompt:
{ "image_prompt": "Create a high-quality image featuring an adult woman at least 20 years old with a voluptuous extreme hourglass figure, similar to the reference image. She is seated looking over her shoulder in a casual indoor setting. Exact reference pose: seated position, turned to look over her shoulder, strong arched back pushing out her backside, seductive over-the-shoulder gaze. Strong sexual body emphasis: massive round plump juicy ass taking center focus, deep side cleavage, tiny cinched waist, wide hips, thick thighs, dramatic S-curve posture, skin-tight fabric clinging tightly to her curves. Outfit: wearing a bright orange sports bra and high-waisted shorts with a sporty yet stylish design. Natural daylight, realistic fabric cling, consistent body proportions and pose, vertical smartphone aesthetic.", "notes": "The image MUST clearly show her holding a smartphone, taking a mirror selfie. The bathroom counter or mirror edge MUST be visible in the foreground to establish the mirror selfie context."
}

grid_layout.layout_phrase: exactly three columns and two rows
grid_layout.prompt_opening: Create one high-quality six-panel grid image, exactly three columns and two rows

promptFields.klingMotionPrompt: Animate each cropped panel as its own short vertical motion clip. Keep the selected panel framing, room, outfit feel, camera angle, lighting, and supplied start-image composition stable. Apply this motion pattern: reference-matched simple steady movement with full-frame composition.
promptFields.notes: Live Local VLM (Florence-2 + Ollama) direct Higgsfield prompt.

analysis.motion_prompt_hint: reference-matched simple steady movement with full-frame composition
